landing.heroTitle: Run your entire school on one platform
landing.heroSubtitle: Smart School unifies student data, grades, attendance, finance, admissions, and digital report cards — multi-school, bilingual, and ready from phone to desktop.
landing.heroNote: No installation · Access anywhere · Data isolated per school
landing.featuresSubtitle: One integrated system replacing piles of spreadsheets and separate apps.
landing.f1Desc: Complete profiles, photos, class history, with fast search & filters.
landing.f2Desc: Grade entry, auto achievement descriptions, and printable report cards.
landing.f3Desc: Mark attendance per class & date, automatic present/excused/sick/absent recap.
landing.f4Desc: Bills, payments, receipts, and real-time outstanding summaries.
landing.f5Desc: New student registration, document verification, and a clean selection flow.
landing.f6Desc: Book catalog, lending, overdue reminders, and asset inventory.
landing.modulesSubtitle: Role-based access (RBAC) — each staff sees only what's relevant.
landing.why1Desc: Indonesian & English, auto-adapts to the user. Ready for global markets.
landing.why2Desc: One platform for many schools, fully isolated & secure data.
landing.why3Desc: Admin, teacher, homeroom, counselor, treasurer — permissions per module.
landing.why4Desc: Comfortable from phone to desktop, no app install needed.
landing.compareSubtitle: Built for Indonesian schools, with modern SaaS standards.
landing.pricingTitle: Simple pricing, scaled to your school
landing.pricingSubtitle: Start free. Upgrade anytime. No hidden fees.
landing.pricingNote: Prices exclude tax. For foundations/multi-school, contact us for a custom quote.

pricingPlans.name: Free
pricingPlans.desc: Great for small schools going digital.

pricingPlans.name: School
pricingPlans.desc: For active schools needing all modules.

landing.faqSubtitle: Still have questions? Reach us via the registration page.

faqItems.q: Do I need to install anything or run my own server?
faqItems.a: No. Smart School is web-based — just open it in a browser from a phone, tablet, or computer. Data is stored securely in the cloud.
Yes. The system is multi-tenant: every school's data is fully isolated and only accessible to that school's users per their role.

faqItems.q: Does it support Kurikulum Merdeka and K13?
faqItems.a: Yes, both are supported. Report cards can be printed in the format your school chooses.
Yes. The app is bilingual (Indonesian & English) and auto-adapts — ideal for national-plus / international schools.

faqItems.q: How do we migrate our old data?
faqItems.a: On paid plans, we help migrate your students, teachers, and grades from spreadsheets or your old system.
Yes. The School plan has a 14-day free trial, and the Free plan can be used forever for small schools.

landing.ctaTitle: Ready to modernize your school administration?
landing.ctaSubtitle: Register your school now and experience managing everything in one place.
landing.footerTagline: A modern School Information System for the digital era.
landing.regSubtitle: Create your school account now — instant access, free for 24 hours.
landing.regSuccessDesc: Thank you. Our team will contact you within 1–2 business days for activation.
landing.regErrorRequired: Please complete school name, contact person, and a contact (email/phone).
landing.regDemoNote: 🎁 Free 24-hour trial — demo account & data are auto-deleted after 24 hours. Upgrade to keep them permanently.
landing.regPasswordShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
landing.testiSubtitle: Stories from schools that got more organized with Smart School.

testiItems.name: Budi Santoso, M.Pd.
testiItems.quote: Admin work that used to take days now takes minutes. Digital report cards are a huge help for teachers.

testiItems.name: Siti Rahmawati, S.Pd.
testiItems.quote: Entering grades and attendance is easy, even from a phone. Parents can monitor their kids directly.

testiItems.name: Andi Pratama
testiItems.quote: From admissions to finance in one system. No more juggling separate apps.

testiItems.name: Dewi Lestari, S.E.
testiItems.quote: Real-time tuition arrears recap. Financial reports are far more accurate and fast.

landing.lmsSubtitle: Complete digital learning — from materials to exams with automatic grading.

lmsItems.title: Structured Materials
lmsItems.desc: Complete, tidy digital learning materials that are easy for students to follow.

lmsItems.title: Auto Distribution
lmsItems.desc: Materials and assignments delivered on schedule with automatic notifications.

lmsItems.title: Online Exams (CBT)
lmsItems.desc: With auto grading and a secure question bank for school exams.

lmsItems.title: Practical Grading
lmsItems.desc: Easy paperless assignment collection and daily grading.

lmsItems.title: Integrated Discussion
lmsItems.desc: Two-way teacher–student Q&A space in one platform.

lmsItems.title: Reports & Monitoring
lmsItems.desc: Track student learning activity in real time and access grade reports easily.

landing.parentSubtitle: Monitor and manage all your child activities — academics, finance, and pocket money — in real time.

parentItems.title: Activity & Attendance
parentItems.desc: Check daily attendance and learning activity in real time.

parentItems.title: Schedule & Assignments
parentItems.desc: See class schedule, assignments, homework, and learning progress.

parentItems.title: Top Up & Track Pocket Money
parentItems.desc: Top up balance and safely monitor your child pocket money usage.

parentItems.title: Admin & Permits
parentItems.desc: Submit leave, see announcements, and school updates from your phone.

parentItems.title: Bills & Payments
parentItems.desc: Pay tuition, activities, and other school bills without queuing.

parentItems.title: School Info
parentItems.desc: Important news and announcements straight from school.

landing.cardSubtitle: One smart card for every school service.

cardItems.title: ID & Attendance
cardItems.desc: Tap the card for automatic student & staff attendance.

cardItems.title: Cashless Canteen
cardItems.desc: Pay with pocket-money balance, no cash needed.

cardItems.title: Library
cardItems.desc: Borrow books with a single card tap.
